_comment: Technology layer additions — deep-merged into root .claude/settings.json by /scaffold. Adds provider doc subdomains not already covered by the root layer's top-level domain entries. Claude Code allowlist matches exact strings (no wildcard / suffix match), so subdomains must be listed explicitly. Do NOT duplicate entries already in the root layer (e.g., docs.expo.dev, posthog.com, supabase.com) — deep-merge concatenates arrays.
